instruction: Navigate to the grades page for CS101. Verify the overall weighted grade displayed matches what you compute from the syllabus weights and individual assignment scores. If you find a discrepancy of more than 1 point from the displayed score, resubmit the most recently graded assignment with file 'grade_dispute.pdf'. If the grade is correct (within 1 point), mark the course's latest announcement as read to confirm you've reviewed your standing.
